data.title: Hyundai Mobis creates 5G telematics solution for autonomous vehicles, leading global market shift from 4G to 5G.
data.description: Hyundai Mobis has recently created a cutting-edge telematics solution known as MTCU, which supports 5G wireless communication. This development has positioned the company as a frontrunner in the worldwide connectivity sector. As the existing telematics market, predominantly reliant on 4G technology, transitions towards utilizing 5G capabilities, it opens up new opportunities for advanced services such as precise mapping services and remote control functionalities. This advancement marks a significant step forward in the realm of telematics systems, as 5G technology continues to reshape and enhance the industry landscape.

data.title: USAP celebrates National CRNA Week, highlighting Certified Registered Nurse Anesthetists' role in safe patient care.
data.description: In Dallas on January 21, 2026, U.S. Anesthesia Partners (USAP), the top single-specialty anesthesia practice in the U.S., acknowledges January 18-24 as National CRNA Week. This week is dedicated to honoring the essential role Certified Registered Nurse Anesthetists (CRNAs) hold in ensuring safe anesthesia delivery.

data.title: Phoenix Energy Tech partners with Disruptive Tech to enhance data insights in commercial buildings. HVAC, refrigeration, & lighting optimization expertise combined for richer insights.
data.description: A company based in Irvine, California, Phoenix Energy Technologies, known for optimizing assets in commercial buildings, has revealed a new partnership with Disruptive Technologies (DT). The latter specializes in providing dependable wireless data insights for healthcare and food retail industries. This collaboration aims to enhance services by merging Phoenix’s proficiency in HVAC, refrigeration, and lighting optimization with DT’s data analysis. The partnership promises to offer improved insights, benchmarking, and more precise decision-making.

data.title: StayTerra invests in Vacation Homes of Hilton Head, a luxury property management brand, founded in 2008; owned by Chris and Jacquelyn Sankowski.
data.description: StayTerra, a platform consisting of top vacation rental brands in prominent American destinations, has revealed its recent investment in Vacation Homes of Hilton Head (VHHH). This collaboration involves VHHH, a renowned luxury property management company based in Hilton Head Island, South Carolina, founded by locals Chris and Jacquelyn Sankowski in 2008. VHHH specializes in offering upscale vacation rental homes on the Island, focusing on combining exclusivity and sophistication to enhance properties to their maximum potential.

data.title: Hospital leaders are focusing on practical insights amidst challenges. Surgical Directions presents most-viewed insights for 2026 performance.
data.description: In January 21, 2026, in Chicago, health systems are experiencing ongoing financial challenges, staff limitations, and an increasing need for surgical services. Hospital leaders are increasingly turning to reliable and effective strategies to address these issues. Specifically, Surgical Directions is providing valuable insights to help hospitals manage these challenges effectively.

data.title: Potomac Bancshares declares $0.13 quarterly cash dividend for common stock.(Board meeting in Jan 2026)
data.description: A bank holding company based in Charles Town, West Virginia, Potomac Bancshares, Inc. (OTCID: PTBS), announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.13 per share for common stock at their Board of Directors meeting in January 21, 2026. Potomac Bancshares, Inc. serves as the parent company for Potomac Bank.

data.title: U.S. Air Force awards AIM $4.9M for autonomous base construction and RADR; AIM's AI platform enables fully autonomous operations for repairs and construction.
data.description: In REDMOND, Wash., AIM, the pioneering AI platform for heavy machinery, revealed it has secured $4.9M in contracts with the U.S. Air Force. These contracts are directed towards remote base and airfield construction and repair. The AIM platform is the world's first embodied AI system for heavy machinery, facilitating fully autonomous operations crucial for Rapid Airfield Damage Recovery (RADR) missions. By harnessing AI capabilities, AIM's platform allows heavy machinery to function autonomously, delivering enhanced speed and resilience. This autonomy enables machines to conduct repairs, construction, and maintenance tasks without the need for human supervision.

data.title: Industrial Logistics Properties Trust to announce Q4 2025 results on Feb 18, 2026, with a conference call on Feb 19, 2026, at 1 pm ET. CEO, CFO, and VP will host the call.
data.description: In Newton, Mass., Industrial Logistics Properties Trust (Nasdaq: ILPT) shared plans to release its fourth quarter 2025 financial results after Nasdaq's closing on February 18, 2026. On February 19, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. Eastern Time, a conference call will be hosted by President/CEO Yael Duffy, CFO/Treasurer Tiffany Sy, and VP Marc Krohn to review these results.

data.title: Seven Hills Realty Trust to release Q4 2025 results on February 18. Conference call on Feb 19 at 11am EST. Nasdaq: SEVN.
data.description: Seven Hills Realty Trust (Nasdaq: SEVN) from Newton, Mass, is set to release its fourth quarter financial results on February 18, 2026, after Nasdaq closes. President Tom Lorenzini, CFO Matthew Brown, and VP Jared Lewis will host a conference call on February 19, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss the results.

data.title: Pangea Lab and Gene Solutions collaborate for cancer diagnostics in US. Pangea is CLIA-certified, CAP-accredited for NGS.
data.description: In Irvine, California, on January 21, 2026, Pangea Laboratory revealed a significant partnership with Gene Solutions, an international biotech company. Pangea Laboratory, recognized for their expertise in Next-Generation Sequencing and molecular diagnostic advancement, holds certifications from CLIA and CAP. This collaboration aims to combine their strengths in innovation and validation for molecular diagnostics.

data.title: commercetools launches new standalone offering, AgenticLift, to accelerate revenue without replatforming. Allows connection to AI shopping experiences without disruption.
data.description: commercetools has unveiled its inaugural standalone agentic solution, enabling enterprises to swiftly and securely join AI-driven shopping enhancements without the need for replatforming or interrupting current commerce functions. This allows companies to seamlessly integrate their in-house or outdated systems with AI-powered capabilities.
Blackrock COO: AI deals show financial engineering creativity.

data.title: Board and Microsoft collaborate to launch Board Agents on Microsoft Foundry, offering AI agents for real-world planning with Microsoft Azure.
data.description: A new development has been unveiled by Board, a prominent Enterprise Planning Platforms provider based in Boston. The company introduced Board Agents on Microsoft Foundry, featuring a collection of specialized AI agents designed to aid in practical planning choices for finance, supply chain, and merchandising. This collaboration marks the debut of a Board enterprise planning tool created using Microsoft Foundry, leveraging the advanced agentic AI resources of Microsoft Azure for enhanced efficiency.

data.title: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent criticizes U.S. defense contractors for delays and high executive pay; contracts behind 5-7 years.
data.description: At the World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent criticized major U.S. defense contractors for their underperformance. Bessent highlighted significant delays in contract fulfillment, with contracts reportedly five to seven years behind schedule. He expressed disappointment, stating that these companies have failed the American people who rely on them. Bessent called for priorities to shift towards building more factories and reducing excessive stock buybacks rather than focusing on high executive compensation. He specifically mentioned defense CEOs earning between $30-$50 million annually despite not meeting expectations. The full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: SureWerx® launching Dickies® Safety Footwear platform in Q4 this year, featuring a range of safety-toe and soft-toe options.
data.description: SureWerx®, a prominent global supplier of safety, tool, and equipment items, has disclosed its plan to introduce Dickies® Safety Footwear, a new footwear line anticipated to be released in the fourth quarter of this year. Drawing on a rich legacy of over 100 years in workwear, the Dickies® Safety Footwear range promises uncompromised performance for the worksite. The collection will feature a diverse selection of safety-toe and soft-toe alternatives, embodying durability and reliability.

data.title: Main Post Partners acquires HomeWell Franchising Inc.®, franchisor of HomeWell Care Services, for growth collaboration.
data.description: In a recent development, Main Post Partners has successfully acquired HomeWell Franchising, the parent company of HomeWell Care Services. This acquisition marks the beginning of a strategic partnership aimed at facilitating the expansion and advancement of HomeWell Care Services.

data.title: Wildwood Trading Group names Luke Warford COO and CFO; leading lumber sales firm, founded in 2018, rapidly expanding nationwide.
data.description: Wildwood Trading Group, based in Tualatin, Oregon, has appointed Luke Warford as its Chief Operating Officer and Chief Financial Officer. In his new role, Warford is responsible for overseeing the company's financial strategy, operational execution, and market-based risk management programs as Wildwood expands its national presence. Since its establishment in 2018, Wildwood has seen substantial growth and is recognized as a rapidly expanding North American lumber sales and distribution firm. The appointment of Warford signifies the company's commitment to further advancement.

data.title: Fortune Minerals finishes cobalt sulphate testing in Canada, confirms production of high-quality product for NICO Project.
data.description: In London, Ontario, Fortune Minerals Limited disclosed the successful completion of validation test work for an enhanced hydrometallurgical flowsheet aimed at producing battery-grade cobalt sulfate heptahydrate for the NICO cobalt-gold-bismuth-copper project in Canada. The company (TSX: FT) (OTCQB: FTMDF) confirmed the ability to produce a top-notch cobalt sulfate heptahydrate product for the project. This achievement underscores significant progress towards leveraging the lucrative market for cobalt in the burgeoning battery industry. For more information, visit the company's website at www.fortuneminerals.com.
